title: helichrysum gravesii
intro: Helichrysum gravesii is a plant species of the genus Helichrysum, which is commonly known as the Everlasting Plant due to its ability to remain fresh for a long time after being picked. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects, which can help to reduce swelling, prevent infections, and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Helichrysum gravesii include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. Helichrysum gravesii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including essential oils, tinctures, and teas, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
